description: CRIT-001 pass threshold 'Every requirement ID appears in at least one test file' is mechanically grep-checkable but does NOT verify the test exercises the requirement. A test file could contain only a stub like `describe('REQ-FILTER-017')` and still pass this threshold. The threshold should require at minimum (a) an executable test assertion citing the REQ, and (b) a passing run for that test. Without this, REQ-FILTER-005 (toLowerCase vs toLocaleLowerCase prohibition), REQ-FILTER-015 (purity invariant), and REQ-FILTER-017 (adversarial input handling) can be silently under-tested.

evidence.snippet: passThreshold: Every requirement ID appears in at least one test file
